case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. HOWARD COBBINS et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COBBINS, HOWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COBBINS, HOWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL STREET UNIT #419, SAN FRANCISCO $737.63 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,462.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
